description: Cables routed across raised floor walkways or aisle paths creating trip hazards
visual_signals: patch cord draped across aisle floor
cable bundle crossing walking path without protection
loose cable on floor between rack rows

description: Unlabeled patch panel cables making circuit identification impossible and slowing incident response
visual_signals: patch cables without labels at panel termination
missing cable tags on patch panel ports
unmarked cables plugged into switch ports

description: Cable bundles blocking rack airflow by obstructing front intake or rear exhaust paths
visual_signals: dense cable mass blocking rear exhaust of rack
cables covering front intake ventilation slots
cable spaghetti filling vertical cable management channel

description: Cables exceeding minimum bend radius causing signal degradation or jacket damage
visual_signals: fiber patch cord kinked at sharp angle
cable bent tightly around rack post
cable sharply folded where it enters conduit or tray

description: Missing raised floor tiles creating fall hazard and disrupting underfloor airflow pressurization
visual_signals: open gap in raised floor grid where tile is absent
exposed underfloor cavity with visible cabling below
floor tile removed and not replaced with blank

description: Missing blanking panels in rack U-spaces allowing hot exhaust air to recirculate to intake
visual_signals: open U-space gap in rack front without blanking panel
multiple empty rack positions without filler panels
visible gap between equipment in rack face

description: Hot aisle or cold aisle containment breach allowing mixing of supply and return air
visual_signals: containment curtain detached or hanging loose
gap between rack tops and ceiling containment
containment door propped open or missing

description: CRAC or CRAH unit air intake blocked by equipment, boxes, or obstructions reducing cooling capacity
visual_signals: items stacked in front of CRAC return air grille
equipment positioned directly against cooling unit intake
cardboard or pallets blocking CRAC airflow path

description: Temperature display panel showing reading outside acceptable operating range
visual_signals: environmental monitor displaying high temperature alarm
temperature readout showing value above threshold
red or amber indicator on room temperature display

description: Fire extinguisher missing from designated location in data hall or electrical room
visual_signals: empty fire extinguisher bracket or cabinet
missing extinguisher from wall-mounted station
extinguisher sign present but no unit on hook

description: Fire suppression system pressure gauge showing fault or out-of-range reading
visual_signals: suppression system gauge needle in red zone
clean agent cylinder pressure below green band
fault indicator on suppression control panel

description: Smoke detector displaying fault light or visibly damaged sensing element
visual_signals: amber or red fault LED on smoke detector
smoke detector housing cracked or hanging open
detector with blinking trouble indicator

description: UPS system displaying warning or alarm indicator suggesting battery or input power issue
visual_signals: amber warning LED on UPS front panel
UPS display showing alarm message
red fault indicator lit on UPS module

description: PDU circuit breaker in tripped position cutting power to connected equipment
visual_signals: breaker handle in middle or off position on PDU
tripped breaker flag visible on power strip
PDU outlet indicator showing no power

description: Battery corrosion or swelling visible on UPS battery modules indicating failure or thermal risk
visual_signals: white crystalline corrosion on battery terminals
bulging or deformed battery case
electrolyte residue or wet stain around battery base

description: Damaged power cable insulation exposing conductors creating electrical and fire hazard
visual_signals: frayed or cut power cord insulation
exposed copper conductors on power cable
melted or heat-damaged power cable jacket

description: Cardboard boxes or combustible packing materials stored inside the data hall
visual_signals: cardboard boxes on floor near server racks
packing foam or paper materials in server room
wooden pallets or crates inside data hall

description: Server cabinet doors left open compromising airflow containment and physical security
visual_signals: rack front door standing open
rear cabinet door ajar exposing cabling
side panel removed from enclosed rack

description: Items stored on top of server racks creating seismic risk and obstructing overhead systems
visual_signals: boxes or equipment placed on rack top
tools or parts sitting on top of cabinet
items stacked above rack height

description: Exit signage not illuminated or emergency lighting non-functional in data hall
visual_signals: dark or unlit exit sign above door
exit sign with burned-out lamp
emergency light heads not illuminated during test

description: UPS battery modules with expired replacement date labels indicating batteries beyond recommended service life
visual_signals: battery label showing manufacture or install date beyond replacement interval
expired battery replacement sticker on UPS module front
battery string with date tag showing overdue replacement date

description: UPS battery cabinet showing signs of electrolyte leakage, staining, or unusual odor indicators around battery enclosure
visual_signals: wet stain or crystalline residue on floor beneath battery cabinet
discolored drip trail running down battery rack frame
corrosion ring forming around battery cell vent cap

description: Generator room fuel day tank or main fuel storage showing leaks, corrosion, or missing secondary containment per NFPA 110
visual_signals: fuel stain or wet spot beneath generator day tank
visible rust or corrosion on fuel storage tank exterior
generator fuel tank without secondary containment berm or pan beneath it

description: Generator exhaust system showing corrosion, leaking joints, or improper routing that could allow exhaust to enter occupied spaces
visual_signals: rust or corrosion holes visible in generator exhaust piping
black soot stains around generator exhaust pipe joints indicating leak
generator exhaust termination point near building air intake or window

description: Generator room lacking visible maintenance and testing logs or logs showing missed weekly or monthly test intervals per NFPA 110
visual_signals: empty clipboard or log holder on generator room wall
generator test log sheet with gaps in weekly entries
generator room with no visible testing documentation posted

description: Generator spill containment area showing accumulated fuel, oil, or coolant indicating deferred maintenance or active leak
visual_signals: oil pooling in generator containment pan beneath engine
fuel sheen visible in generator room floor drain or containment
coolant puddle or stain near generator radiator or hose connection

description: Structured cabling with visible bend radius violations, kinks, or physical damage to fiber optic or copper cables in pathway
visual_signals: fiber optic cable sharply bent around cable tray edge exceeding bend radius
kinked or crushed cable visible in cable management arm
cable jacket abraded or cut where it passes through grommet or conduit edge

description: Unlabeled or mislabeled patch cords and structured cables preventing accurate documentation and slowing troubleshooting
visual_signals: patch cords between racks with no visible labels on either end
cable label flags faded and illegible at patch panel termination
fiber optic patch cord missing identification label at connector

description: Containment system integrity compromised by missing blanking panels above racks, unsealed cable cutouts, or damaged containment curtains allowing bypass airflow
visual_signals: gap above rack top where containment panel is missing allowing air bypass
unsealed cable cutout in containment wall with visible hot air mixing
torn or sagging containment curtain strip between rack rows

description: Environmental monitoring sensor missing, improperly placed, or showing fault condition for humidity, temperature, or water leak detection
visual_signals: empty sensor mounting bracket on wall or rack with trailing disconnected cable
water leak detection cable coiled up on shelf instead of deployed along floor
environmental sensor display showing fault or offline status indicator

description: VESDA or aspirating smoke detection system showing alert, fault, or disabled status on its display panel
visual_signals: VESDA panel displaying amber alert or red fire indicator
aspirating smoke detector panel with fault LED illuminated
VESDA unit with disabled or isolate status shown on display

description: Physical security control compromised by tailgating indicators, propped mantrap doors, or visible camera coverage gaps in data center
visual_signals: mantrap inner door propped open with wedge or object
security camera with obstructed lens or pointed at ceiling instead of access point
badge reader at data hall entrance showing fault light or powered off

description: PDU or busway showing signs of overloaded circuits, thermal discoloration, or loose connections indicating electrical risk
visual_signals: discoloration or heat marks on PDU breaker panel or bus connection
PDU load display showing circuit utilization above safe threshold percentage
loose or partially unseated power connector at PDU outlet or whip connection

description: Grounding or bonding conductor exposed, disconnected, or showing corrosion at connection points compromising equipment grounding system
visual_signals: green grounding conductor hanging disconnected from rack bonding lug
corrosion visible at grounding busbar connection point
missing bonding jumper between adjacent rack frames where bonding lug is present

description: Clean agent fire suppression system cylinder showing low pressure, physical damage, or abort switch in non-standard position
visual_signals: clean agent cylinder pressure gauge needle below green normal range
dent or corrosion visible on clean agent suppression cylinder body
fire suppression abort switch in the activated or non-normal position

description: Equipment mounted in rack without proper cage nuts, screws, or rail mounting hardware creating risk of equipment falling
visual_signals: server sitting on rack rails without visible front mounting screws
equipment balanced on shelf ears without being secured to rack posts
missing cage nuts at rack mounting positions with equipment resting unsecured

description: Rack elevation diagram not posted on or near rack, or cable documentation labels not matching physical connections
visual_signals: rack interior door with empty document holder and no elevation diagram
rack front with no equipment identification labels or asset tags visible
cable labels at patch panel not matching the label at the far end of the same cable

description: Emergency power-off procedures, shutdown sequence, or emergency contact information not posted in visible location within data hall
visual_signals: data hall wall near entrance with no emergency procedure signage posted
EPO button area without accompanying shutdown procedure placard
empty or outdated emergency contact sheet at data center entrance

description: Emergency flashlights missing from designated locations or non-functional for use during power outage or lighting failure in data center
visual_signals: empty flashlight mounting bracket at data hall entrance or exit
flashlight in holder with visible corrosion indicating dead batteries
missing emergency flashlight from wall-mounted clip near data center entry

description: Liquid cooling system showing leak indicators, missing drip trays, loose hose connections, or low glycol level in reservoir
visual_signals: water or coolant drip stain on floor beneath liquid-cooled rack or CDU
rear-door heat exchanger hose connection with visible moisture at fitting
liquid cooling distribution unit glycol reservoir showing level below minimum mark

description: Liquid cooling drip containment tray missing, improperly positioned, or full of accumulated liquid beneath cooling connections
visual_signals: liquid cooling hose connection point above raised floor with no drip tray beneath
drip pan under CDU filled with standing coolant liquid
missing containment tray at quick-disconnect coolant fitting location

description: Server rack not anchored to raised floor or concrete slab with proper seismic bracing hardware per local seismic zone requirements
visual_signals: rack base with empty bolt holes and no floor anchoring hardware visible
server rack visibly leaning or not plumb due to missing anchor bolts
rack without visible seismic bracing brackets at top or base attachment points

description: Overhead cable tray or ladder rack lacking seismic bracing or lateral support in seismic zone installation
visual_signals: cable tray suspended from ceiling with no diagonal seismic brace wires
overhead ladder rack with visible sway or sag between support points
cable tray support rod without lateral bracing in long unsupported span

description: Water or liquid stain visible on raised floor, ceiling, or near equipment indicating active or previous leak requiring investigation
visual_signals: water stain ring visible on raised floor tile surface
ceiling tile above data hall showing brown water damage discoloration
dried mineral deposit trail on floor from previous water intrusion path

description: Humidity reading on environmental display showing out-of-range value per ASHRAE recommended envelope creating condensation or ESD risk
visual_signals: environmental monitor displaying humidity value outside ASHRAE recommended range
condensation droplets forming on cold surfaces near cooling supply
humidity sensor readout showing critically low relative humidity value
